description.value: Aura moderate divination; CL 7th; Slot genie seal; Price 10,000 gp; Weight — DESCRIPTION This seal is a disk of mithral inscribed with dozens of spiraling arcane and magical sigils. As long as the seal is carried visibly, the carrier can speak and understand all of the elemental tongues. Furthermore, he gains a +5 competence bonus on Intimidate checks made against genies, as long as he speaks in the genie’s native tongue. Language-dependent spells cast by the carrier of interpretation of secrets are enhanced — any genie that is targeted by such a spell suffers a –2 penalty on any saving throw to resist the effect of the spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Wondrous Item, tongues; Cost 5,000 gp
